'''''Challenge'' 41''' was a roleplaying magazine from December [[1989]]/January [[1990]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Paid in Full]]" and was written by [[Lester W. Smith]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
